authority.department: Department of Labour, Government of Punjab

overview: State-specific labour law requirements applicable to establishments operating in Punjab.

rules.title: Review Punjab Shops and Commercial Establishments Registration
rules.description: Determine whether registration under the Punjab Shops and Commercial Establishments Act is applicable.

citations.reference: Punjab Shops and Commercial Establishments Act

rules.title: Maintain Statutory Registers and Employment Records
rules.description: Maintain statutory registers, employee records and prescribed notices under Punjab labour legislation.

rules.title: Display Statutory Notices
rules.description: Display statutory notices and employee information required under Punjab labour legislation.

rules.title: Review Working Hours, Overtime, Leave and Weekly Holidays
rules.description: Ensure compliance with Punjab provisions governing working hours, overtime, leave and weekly holidays.

citations.reference: Punjab Shops and Commercial Establishments Rules

rules.title: Review Labour Welfare Fund Compliance
rules.description: Review employer obligations relating to the Punjab Labour Welfare Fund, where applicable.

rules.title: Review Minimum Wage Notifications
rules.description: Ensure employee wages comply with the latest minimum wage notifications applicable in Punjab.

citations.reference: Government of Punjab Minimum Wage Notifications

rules.title: Monitor Punjab Labour Notifications
rules.description: Review labour department notifications, amendments, exemptions and compliance circulars issued by the Government of Punjab.

recommended.title: Annual Labour Compliance Audit
recommended.description: Conduct an annual audit covering statutory registrations, labour welfare, payroll compliance and inspection readiness.

recommended.title: Digital Compliance Calendar
recommended.description: Maintain a digital calendar for statutory filings, licence renewals, inspections and labour compliance due dates.
